message:
refactor(cli): resolve clippy warnings and apply code quality improvements

Add clippy allow attributes for expected complexity patterns
(struct_excessive_bools, too_many_lines, option_option). Replace
manual Default impls with #[derive(Default)] for StatsArgs and
CheckArgs. Improve code quality throughout:
- Use if-let chains and map_or_else patterns
- Named format args ({label:<width$}) instead of positional
- Pattern matching guards for cleaner control flow
- Fix test iteration to avoid needless clone (for case in &cases)
- Replace lossy as-casts with i64::try_from() for precision safety

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
